mapper.sql: a.id AS "id", a.parent_id AS "parent.id", a.parent_ids AS "parentIds", a.name, a.path, a.target, a.icon, a.sort, a.is_show AS "isShow", a.affix AS "affix", a.menu_type AS "type", a.permission, a.component, a.iframeLink, a.externalLink, a.remarks, a.create_by AS "createBy.id", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_by AS "updateBy.id", a.update_date AS "updateDate", a.del_flag AS "delFlag", p.name AS "parent.name"
LEFT JOIN sys_menu_two p ON p.id = a.parent_id
mapper.select: select from sys_menu_two a where a.parent_id = #{id} ORDER BY sort
select case when exists(select 1 from sys_menu_two where parent_id = #{id}) then 1 else 0 end
select from sys_menu_two a where a.id = #{id}

SELECT
FROM sys_menu_two a
WHERE a.del_flag = #{DEL_FLAG_NORMAL} ORDER BY a.sort

SELECT
FROM sys_menu_two a
WHERE a.del_flag = #{DEL_FLAG_NORMAL} AND ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_datarule sd WHERE sd.menu_id = a.id ) > 0 ORDER BY a.sort
SELECT a.id, a.parent_id AS "parent.id", a.parent_ids AS "parentIds" FROM sys_menu_two a WHERE a.del_flag = #{DEL_FLAG_NORMAL} AND a.parent_ids LIKE #{parentIds} ORDER BY a.sort

SELECT DISTINCT
FROM sys_menu_two a LEFT JOIN sys_menu_two p ON p.id = a.parent_id JOIN sys_role_menu_two rm ON rm.menu_id = a.id JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = rm.role_id AND r.useable='1' JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = r.id JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = ur.user_id AND u.id = #{userId} WHERE a.del_flag = #{DEL_FLAG_NORMAL} AND r.del_flag = #{DEL_FLAG_NORMAL} AND u.del_flag = #{DEL_FLAG_NORMAL} ORDER BY a.sort

SELECT a.id AS "id", a.menu_id AS "menuId", a.name AS "name", a.t_field AS "field", a.t_express AS "express", a.t_value AS "value", a.sql_segment AS "sqlSegment", a.remarks AS "remarks", a.del_flag AS "delFlag" FROM sys_datarule a
a.menu_id =#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_menu_two( id, parent_id, parent_ids, name, path, target, icon, sort, menu_type, is_show, permission, component, iframeLink, externalLink, create_by, create_date, update_by, update_date, remarks, affix, del_flag ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{parent.id}, #{parentIds}, #{name}, #{path}, #{target}, #{icon}, #{sort}, #{type}, #{isShow}, #{permission}, #{component}, #{iframeLink}, #{externalLink}, #{createBy.id}, #{createDate}, #{updateBy.id}, #{updateDate}, #{remarks}, #{affix}, #{delFlag} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_menu_two
parent_id = #{parent.id},
parent_ids = #{parentIds},
name = #{name},
path = #{path},
target = #{target},
icon = #{icon},
sort = #{sort},
menu_type = #{type},
is_show = #{isShow},
permission = #{permission},
component = #{component},
iframeLink = #{iframeLink},
externalLink = #{externalLink},
update_by = #{updateBy.id},
update_date = #{updateDate},
affix = #{affix},
remarks = #{remarks},
WHERE id = #{id}
DELETE FROM sys_menu_two WHERE id = #{id} OR parent_ids LIKE CONCAT('%,', #{id}, ',%')
